items.name: SCORCH Red Shorts Luxury Preppy Streetwear Summer
items.description:
[ SCORCH // RED MONOGRAM LUXURY DROP ]

The elite SCORCH aesthetic returns in a bold Red & White monogram finish. These luxury shorts are designed for the high-end streetwear scene, combining a clean summer fit with our signature monogram detailing. Don't just wear clothes—wear a statement.

🔥 PRODUCT DETAILS:

Brand Identity: Official SCORCH Signature Series.
Design: High-definition Red & White monogram print with premium "SCORCH" branding.
Fit: Modern Comfort Fit. Perfect for Hypebeast, Preppy, and Aesthetic Y2K outfits.

🔗 MATCHING ITEMS:
Complete the look with the "SCORCH Red Hoodie" available in our group store!
https://www.roblox.com/id/catalog/70482096385439/SCORCH-Red-Luxury-Hoodie-Preppy-Urban-Streetwear
